title: Smart Performance
description:
Boost FPS, Boost Loading , Increase Performance and Stable Gameplay in Minecraft. FPS Boost upto 50 to 80%
platfrom Fabric
body:
![Smart Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aff39233534b03cdb4498aba597a27980133699_0.webp)

This time I present you "Smart Performance" Modpack.
its simply boost the fps in Minecraft.
by using less then 25 Mods, 2 texture packs and no Shaders.

Smart Performance Modpack optimize the Minecraft and graphics.
this Modpack Boost FPS upto 50 to 80%

:Faster Loading
:Performance Boost
:Stable Gamelay

this modpack contain performance mods and speed mods.

Also, please support the creators of all of these mods and added content! They make great stuff, go check them out!

This mudpack is only for Fabric Platform Currently.

Less Mods,More Performance,Better Gameplay.


Enjoy the "[Smart Performance]" Modpack


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
